message: Hey team!:rocket: Can you believe it's been 8 fantastic years for Online Boutique?
Before we dive into anniversary celebrations, let's give a warm welcome to Maya, our new Security Analyst. She's got 5 years of cybersecurity expertise under her belt! :clap:
Hi everyone! :raised_hand_with_fingers_splayed: Thrilled to be here, especially on such a special occasion. Let's make Online Boutique even successful and secure together!
Welcome, Maya! Your experience will elevate our cybersecurity efforts.
Excited to have you, Maya! Bez has been very excited to have you on the team.
Impressive! Eager to learn from you, Maya.
:+1: Welcome Maya, pleasure meeting you.
Hi Maya! Your experience is top-notch. Cheers to you and to Online Boutique's 8-year anniversary! :partying_face: :tada:
Thanks for the warm welcome! Excited for the celebration and our anniversary party.

Welcome to The Switch, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

:alarm_clock: - You have 25 minutes to resolve the outage, good luck! You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
We are all so glad you have joined us Maya
Hold on, team. Quick check-in. Is anyone else experiencing internet problems or slow connectivity?
Internet's definitely sluggish, was loading up github and it took ages to load
Perhaps it could be due to the increase of sales we have been having with this anniversary sale?
Hey team, we've seen some weird traffic from our data centre network in the last couple of days, it's been mostly minor but never as bad compared to now although
Hamed and I will have been monitoring outbound traffic. Checking for anomalies again.
I will try to place an order and check the platform.
Just ran a test on my internet speed.
Internet Speed Test

:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
I will check reports

Tinus, when did u experience slowness first?
Not exactly sure about the start time. But I've been observing it for the last 2 weeks
I started to feel it this morning
Reports from as far back as two weeks mention slow site performance and timeouts
Some customers are placing orders without issues, while others report long load times
Issues reported by customers are widespread, not limited to any specific region
network slowness and timeouts SEV2
*Incident Number INC100069:* network slowness and timeouts SEV2
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
Team, please share the recent changes that could cause network slowness?
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Can they place an order and we have got a holding page in place?
Tanya, any reports on anomalies
Here is the list of latest changes: <https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/ULPUBLIC/pages/1113522209/The+Switch+-+Change+Request+Logs>
Let me check the networks
Bez, orders are being placed, but there are few timeouts
platforms team is investigating
Noticing a spike in outbound connections. The IP range affected is the same as our frontend and payments
Daniel can you review your changes if it is impacting the network
:star: Reviewed changes
Is it my payments change ?
Tanya please review your last changes along with Daniel, to see for any potential impacts
What we know so far, this is not a global issue but specific to payments and frontend IP ranges
If the issues have been started to reported in the past 2 weeks, then I guess it's not a change-related issue
:star: Qualify the problem
All the changes from app side were meant for global users
Hamed S any changes on platforms that was done 2 weeks ago that could impact networks?
Hey, what's happening?
We know that there is a spike in outbound connections as reported by Tanya
ok
:star: Use metrics as evidence
There had been a spike on network outbound connections, investigating further
another update in next 5 minutes
:star: Track actions and time box them
There is a spike in outbound connections which is abnormal
Team, what are our assumptions on this?
We must involve Maya to check the security

1. Its not change related issue
2. Issue started in past 2 weeks
Maya please assist the team to understand the reason for outvbound connection spike
Running the security scan now
Issue is evident since past 2 weeks, not associated to a change
Maya, from security team is assisting with investigations
next update in 2 mins
Security scan shows issues related to our network switch. Working on identifying the exact cause
thanks Maya
@Tanya and @Hamed, need your assistance in a detailed review

Our investigation uncovered a critical issue: the network switch was compromised due to unpatched vulnerabilities. We have identified a BotNet in the switch and it's creating outbound connections to the outside. It creates a DDOS (Distributed Denial of Service) to attack an external party

Our understanding so far,
Issue with network switch (must be hardware issue), started 2 weeks ago, not change related
Thanks Hamed
Found a critical issue. Our network switch was compromised due to unpatched vulnerabilities, leading to a BotNet creating DDOS attacks.
Bob, please inform clients this issue will be resolved shortly
Have we figured out the issue ?
Maya is this something you can resolve on the go?
Sure thanks
The network switch's vulnerabilities were exploited. We need to address this immediately
There is an issue with network switch, there was a Botnet injection
working on resolving it
The disruption affects both our internal and external users
next update in 2 mins
Suggesting a switch restart. Though I'm not sure
Hamed S please share your thoughts on how to address this?
Still getting along with the understanding of our system
Restart isn't advisable
Maya how to remove the botnet from netweok
Your right restarting the switch isnt the best option as it might intruduce some more issues
Trying to think of another solution but i'm not too familiar with the network infrastructure here at OB
No worries Maya I can send over the graph of the network infra if you wanna look at it
That would be perfect @hamed
Network Diagram
Looking at the diagram now, will need a moment to figure out what to do next
Let me know if you have any suggestions in the mean time
Wait! Are we compromised?
Security team is working with Platform team to resolve the issue
This is nightmare , any data theft ?
yes Bez,
regulators are going to get into my head for this now
Maya /Hamed S did we lose information when the network got compromised?
No, its DDoS attack
we are working on the emergency fix to resolve this
Just stressing the systems
No exfiltration
we didn't lose data
only added more load to system, data wasn't compromised
Thanks, slight relief
thanks
Maya any luck with resolution based on network graph?
We can failover to a redundant switch
:star: Manage actions and timings
That should work, we will divert our traffic and the attacker won't be able to exploit the switch vulnerability
Hamed S /Tanya could you try that?
Downside we will be offline for a few moments
Bob please inform clients about this downtime
I will assist you @maya
Sure
Preparing to bypass the infected switch
Bez we are moving to a redundant switch
there will be minor downtime
clients are informed
thanks Maya
the infected switch has been successfully changed over
The Catalyst 9300 Series which is our infected switch has been swapped over to old but reliable (Cisco Catalyst 2960 Series)
Good job, can we confirm @Melvin Varughese?
Team, do u still face network slowness
:star: Cross checking resolution with team
i dont face it
No impact observed on the redundant switch. Successfully bypassed the infected switch
seeing more orders per minute
thanks Maya
successfully bypassed the infected switch

Cheers, everyone! Resolving these network issues added a bit of spice to our celebration
Good job team! We managed to keep the anniversary vibe alive despite the detour.
High-fives all around!  I will take out that faulty switch as soon as possible.
The website's performance is looking solid again
The anniversary orders are flowing smoothly now. No hiccups on the code side.
thanks Hamed, tanya and Maya
Our customers are back to enjoying the celebration. Happy customers, happy anniversary!
Really great job @Melvin Varughese.
Special congratulations to our Incident Manager for steering the ship with finesse and to Maya for your help identifying the faulty switch. Cheers to a remarkable team! :tada:
